tariffs.additional_info: Section: Live Animals, Chapter: 01 - Live animals, Description: Pure-bred breeding horses
Section: Meat and Edible Meat Offal, Chapter: 02 - Meat of bovine animals, fresh or chilled, Description: Boneless
Section: Fish and Crustaceans, Chapter: 03 - Fish and crustaceans, molluscs and other aquatic invertebrates, Description: Norway lobsters (Nephrops norvegicus)
Section: Dairy Produce, Chapter: 04 - Dairy produce; birds' eggs; natural honey, Description: Of a fat content, by weight, exceeding 10%

Section: Electrical Machinery and Equipment, Chapter: 85 - Electrical machinery and equipment and parts thereof, Description: Machines for the reception, conversion and transmission or regeneration of voice, images or other data, including switching and routing apparatus
